Downloads

Download Whatszara

Latest release — Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux. No Python required.

Other Ways to Get Whatszara

Build from Source

git clone https://github.com/Preet3627/whatszara.git
cd whatszara
./setup.sh
make desktop

GitHub Releases

All release assets including checksums and source code are available on GitHub.

View All Releases
